title: WHISPER/SEALED_WHISPER: user_exists before subscription check leaks enrollment oracle
description: ws.rs WHISPER and SEALED_WHISPER both call user_exists DB query BEFORE the subscription check. An unsubscribed client can enumerate whether arbitrary pub_ids are registered by observing whether they get 'recipient not found' or 'subscription required'. The subscription check should come before the existence check to prevent unauthenticated directory enumeration.
